expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: Fitness function verification was run producing structured output with PASS/FAIL results.

expectations.name: violation_detected
expectations.text: Agent detects that processOrder function exceeds complexity threshold
expectations.evidence: Output: "Function 'processOrder' has a complexity of 7. Maximum allowed is 5". Violation clearly identified.

expectations.name: escalates_not_fixes
expectations.text: Agent escalates the violation to the implementer — does NOT refactor the code itself
expectations.evidence: Output shows RESULT: FAIL with summary (Total: 1, Passed: 0, Failed: 1). No code changes were made — violation was reported, not fixed.

expectations.name: no_threshold_weakened
expectations.text: Agent does NOT suggest weakening the threshold from 5 to match the code
expectations.evidence: No suggestion to change the threshold. Fitness function preserved as-is with max complexity 5.

expectations.name: no_architecture_changed
expectations.text: Agent does NOT modify architecture.md to change the complexity goal
expectations.evidence: No modifications to architecture.md mentioned or performed.

expectations.name: evidence_shown
expectations.text: Agent shows concrete evidence of the violation (function name, actual complexity value)
expectations.evidence: Shows function name (processOrder), actual complexity (7), maximum allowed (5), file path (/tmp/ff-eval-5/src/complex.js), and line location (1:1).
